betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Smart Cable§f

§a8-channel cable with active channel indicator.§f

The §bME Smart Cable§f carries §e8 channels§f and displays active channels as colored lines on the cable face. Available in §e16 colors§f.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e8§f
§b•§f Visual: §9glowing channel indicators§f
§b•§f Available in all 16 AE2 cable colors
§b•§f Fluix-colored smart cable (meta 56) is the default

§6Why It Matters§f:
The visual channel display shows exactly how many of the §e8 channels§f are in use, making network debugging straightforward. The cable face lights up proportional to channel usage.

§6Use Cases§f:
§b•§f §aDebugging networks§f: see at a glance which cables are full
§b•§f §aNetwork planning§f: visualize channel load before adding devices
§b•§f §aAesthetic builds§f: glowing cables look tech-style

§6Upgradeable§f:
Smart cable can be upgraded to:
§b•§f §bDense Smart Cable§f (32 channels)

§eTip§f: When working on a complex network, temporarily upgrade key cable segments to §bSmart Cable§f to identify bottlenecks. Once debugged, swap back to §bCovered§f.
